items.title: Dartmouth endowment invests in Solana ETF, holds $14M in crypto exposure
items.whyYouShouldCare: Dartmouth's $14M investment in a Solana ETF signals institutional confidence, potentially boosting SOL's credibility and attracting more liquidity to the ecosystem.

items.title: Forward Industries posts over 300% revenue growth but wider quarterly net loss amid SOL markdowns
items.whyYouShouldCare: Forward Industries' significant revenue growth alongside SOL markdowns highlights the volatility in crypto markets, which could impact investor sentiment towards SOL.

items.title: The $100 roadblock – Why Solana’s ETF inflows couldn’t shatter the range highs
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite ETF inflows, Solana's price struggles to break the $100 barrier, indicating resistance levels that could affect future trading strategies and liquidity.
